heading: Income tax laws; modification or repeal by legislature
label: 845 Income tax laws; modification or repeal by legislature
text: The Puerto Rican Legislature shall have power by due enactment to amend, alter, modify, or repeal the income tax laws in force in Puerto Rico.
notes: CodificationSimilar provisions of act , which related to the Philippine Islands, were formerly classified to .Feb. 26, 1926section 1055 of this titleSection was not enacted as part of the Puerto Rican Federal Relations Act which comprises this chapter.
